# sailpoint_role (Resource)

Resource for SailPoint Role. Roles are the top of the access hierarchy — they bundle access profiles and entitlements together and can define dynamic membership via criteria-based rules or explicit identity lists.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Minimal role
resource "sailpoint_role" "basic" {
  name = "IT Administrator"

  owner = {
    type = "IDENTITY"
    id   = "REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_IDENTITY_ID"
  }
}

# Role with access profiles and STANDARD criteria-based membership
resource "sailpoint_role" "engineering" {
  name        = "Engineering Role"
  description = "Grants engineering team access to development tools"
  enabled     = true
  requestable = true

  owner = {
    type = "IDENTITY"
    id   = "REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_IDENTITY_ID"
  }

  access_profiles = [
    { type = "ACCESS_PROFILE", id = "REPLACE_WITH_ACCESS_PROFILE_ID_1" },
    { type = "ACCESS_PROFILE", id = "REPLACE_WITH_ACCESS_PROFILE_ID_2" },
  ]

  membership = {
    type = "STANDARD"
    criteria = {
      operation = "AND"
      children = [
        {
          operation = "EQUALS"
          key = {
            type     = "IDENTITY"
            property = "attribute.department"
          }
          string_value = "Engineering"
        },
        {
          operation = "EQUALS"
          key = {
            type     = "IDENTITY"
            property = "attribute.cloudLifecycleState"
          }
          string_value = "active"
        },
      ]
    }
  }

  access_request_config = {
    comments_required        = true
    denial_comments_required = true
    approval_schemes = [
      { approver_type = "MANAGER" },
      { approver_type = "OWNER" },
    ]
  }

  segments = ["REPLACE_WITH_SEGMENT_ID"]
}

# Role with IDENTITY_LIST membership (explicit identity assignments)
resource "sailpoint_role" "special_access" {
  name    = "Special Access Role"
  enabled = true

  owner = {
    type = "IDENTITY"
    id   = "REPLACE_WITH_OWNER_IDENTITY_ID"
  }

  membership = {
    type = "IDENTITY_LIST"
    identities = [
      { id = "REPLACE_WITH_IDENTITY_ID_1" },
      { id = "REPLACE_WITH_IDENTITY_ID_2" },
    ]
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the role (max 128 chars).
- `owner` (Attributes) The owner of the role. Typically `type = IDENTITY`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--owner))

### Optional

- `access_profiles` (Attributes Set) Access profiles bundled into this role. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--access_profiles))
- `access_request_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--access_request_config))
- `additional_owners` (Attributes Set) Additional owners. Each may be `IDENTITY` or `GOVERNANCE_GROUP`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--additional_owners))
- `description` (String) Description (max 2000 chars).
- `dimension_refs` (Attributes Set) Dimensions referenced by this role (when dimensional=true). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--dimension_refs))
- `dimensional` (Boolean) Whether this is a dimensional role.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the role is enabled.
- `entitlements` (Attributes Set) Entitlements bundled directly into this role. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entitlements))
- `membership` (Attributes) Role membership rules. `type = STANDARD` uses `criteria`; `type = IDENTITY_LIST` uses `identities`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--membership))
- `requestable` (Boolean) Whether the role can be requested. Defaults to `false`.
- `revoke_request_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--revoke_request_config))
- `segments` (Set of String) Segment UUIDs the role is visible in.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String)
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the role.
- `modified` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--owner"></a>
### Nested Schema for `owner`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--access_profiles"></a>
### Nested Schema for `access_profiles`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--access_request_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `access_request_config`

Optional:

- `approval_schemes` (Attributes List) Ordered approval chain for access requests. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--access_request_config--approval_schemes))
- `comments_required` (Boolean)
- `denial_comments_required` (Boolean)
- `max_permitted_access_duration` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--access_request_config--max_permitted_access_duration))
- `reauthorization_required` (Boolean)
- `require_end_date` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--access_request_config--approval_schemes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `access_request_config.approval_schemes`

Required:

- `approver_type` (String) One of `OWNER`, `MANAGER`, `GOVERNANCE_GROUP`, `WORKFLOW`.

Optional:

- `approver_id` (String) ID of the approver. Required when `approver_type` is `GOVERNANCE_GROUP` or `WORKFLOW`.


<a id="nestedatt--access_request_config--max_permitted_access_duration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `access_request_config.max_permitted_access_duration`

Optional:

- `time_unit` (String)
- `value` (Number)

### Nested Schema for `additional_owners`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)

### Nested Schema for `dimension_refs`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)

### Nested Schema for `entitlements`

Required:

- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--membership"></a>
### Nested Schema for `membership`

Required:

- `type` (String) `STANDARD` or `IDENTITY_LIST`.

Optional:

- `criteria` (Attributes) Criteria tree for STANDARD membership. Max 3 levels deep. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--membership--criteria))
- `identities` (Attributes List) Explicit identity list for IDENTITY_LIST membership. Max 500 modifications per PATCH. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--membership--identities))

<a id="nestedatt--membership--criteria"></a>
### Nested Schema for `membership.criteria`

Required:

- `operation` (String)

Optional:

- `key` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--membership--criteria--key))
- `string_value` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--revoke_request_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `revoke_request_config`

Optional:

- `approval_schemes` (Attributes List) Ordered approval chain for revoke requests. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--revoke_request_config--approval_schemes))
- `comments_required` (Boolean)
- `denial_comments_required` (Boolean)

<a id="nestedatt--revoke_request_config--approval_schemes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `revoke_request_config.approval_schemes`

Required:

- `approver_type` (String) One of `OWNER`, `MANAGER`, `GOVERNANCE_GROUP`, `WORKFLOW`.

Optional:

- `approver_id` (String) ID of the approver. Required when `approver_type` is `GOVERNANCE_GROUP` or `WORKFLOW`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
#!/bin/bash
# Import an existing role by its ID
terraform import sailpoint_role.engineering "REPLACE_WITH_ROLE_ID"
```
